					'logger'       => $this->_id,
					'log_order'    => $log_order,

					'request_type' => $request_type,
					'request_url'  => $request_url,

					'function'     => ( ! empty( $caller['class'] ) ? $caller['class'] . $caller['type'] : '' ) . $caller['function'],
					'created'      => microtime( true ),
				)
			)
